titleStmt.title: SII 10.314: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 314. (A.R. No. 586 of 1925.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR THE GĀLIGŌPURA MAṆṬAPAM IN THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGĒŚVARA, VĒLPŪRU, SATTENEPALLI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1169. (Plavaṅga)

summary.p: States that Dōchena Peggaḍa assigned (?) to the temple of Rāmēśvara at Vēlpunūru the duty known as aḍḍavaṭṭa and duties leviable on sales and purchases of various articles, on oil-mills and on marriages, for the merit of Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samadhigatapa
ṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara Anma
koṁḍapuravarēśvara paramamāhēśvara
patihitacarita vinayavibhūṣaṇa nā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍḍalēśvara kākatiyyagaṇapati
dēvamahārājulaku dha¨rmmā¨rtthamu
vēlpunūri śrīrāmēśvaramahā
ṭi śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1169 gu
nēṁṭi praplavaṁgasaṁvatsarama māghabahu
ḷa 15 Ādivāramunāṁḍu ni
gyatōyugaṁ ddhamaṁḍu sēniti maṇi
kyuṁḍunu naina dōcenapeggaḍa gaṇapaya
saṁsiddhasthānamaina vēlpūra Aḍḍavaṭṭa
mēra Aṁttavaṭṭūnu yēmi yēnā
nu vilicina guṟṟamu vilcina yeddu vi
lcina bhaṁḍi vilcina varu vilcina yē
vilcina goṟṟela vilcina Ammina peṁḍli
sēsina nuvvulu vilcina kolcu vilcina
kelavaganaṁdacci Amminānu gā
nuvula mudrasuṁkamu varusa rūka
lu sahitama Imēralu Evvaru dappikonna
gaṇapatidēvamahārāju lānā
Digital edition of SII 10.314 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
